# Dan Brown — Goodreads Listopia Ranking Specialist

> Expert Goodreads Listopia listing and ranking services that boost book visibility and help authors reach the right readers.

Dan Brown helps authors get their books featured on the most relevant, high-traffic Goodreads Listopia lists, driving shelf adds, reviews, and lasting reader discovery.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Services, process, about Dan Brown, and booking a free Listopia audit call.

## Services

- Listopia listing on strategic, genre-relevant lists
- Ranking boost campaigns through authentic engagement
- Genre targeting and top-10 placement
- Weekly reporting and visibility insights
